title: Changelog
subtitle: Track all updates, improvements, and new features
description: A comprehensive history of all changes made to the Air Canada Strike Tracker between August 15-16, 2025

1.2.0.title: Comprehensive Changelog System
1.2.0.summary: Complete changelog system with detailed version tracking and comprehensive documentation

changes.description: Full changelog system with dedicated pages (EN/FR)
details: Timeline-based changelog design with visual indicators
Collapsible detailed sections for comprehensive information
Version categorization system (Major/Minor releases)
Change type classification (Features, Improvements, Fixes, Security)
Comprehensive documentation of all features developed

changes.description: Footer integration with changelog links
details: Added changelog links to both English and French homepages
Seamless language switching between changelog versions
Proper routing integration for /changelog and /fr/changelog

changes.description: Enhanced i18n configuration for changelog namespace
details: Added changelog namespace to translation system
Comprehensive translation files for both languages
Proper import and export of changelog translations

1.1.0.title: Enhanced Navigation & User Experience
1.1.0.summary: Complete navigation overhaul with mobile-first design and improved accessibility

changes.description: Mobile-responsive hamburger menu with organized sections
details: Sheet component implementation for mobile navigation
Accordion-based categorized menu structure
Live data integration directly in mobile menu
Real-time strike metrics and visitor counters
Touch-friendly interface with proper spacing

changes.description: Desktop collapsible navigation with categorized content
details: Organized navigation into logical sections: Live Data, Quick Navigation, Main Content, Additional Info, Settings
Collapsible accordion interface for desktop users
Quick access to all major sections and features
Enhanced navigation hierarchy for better user flow

changes.description: Improved accessibility with proper ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
details: Comprehensive ARIA labeling for screen readers
Keyboard navigation support for all interactive elements
Semantic HTML structure for better accessibility
Focus management for sheet and accordion components

changes.description: Enhanced mobile experience with touch-friendly interface
details: Optimized touch targets for mobile devices
Responsive grid layouts for different screen sizes
Mobile-specific navigation patterns
Swipe-friendly gesture support

changes.description: Advanced component integration and state management
details: Integration of Radix UI Sheet component for mobile menu
Accordion component for organized content display
Real-time data passing to navigation components
Proper event handling for smooth scrolling navigation

1.0.1.title: Content Enhancement & Context
1.0.1.summary: Added detailed explanations and context for strike impact calculations with enhanced source verification

changes.description: Detailed unpaid hours explanation with flight attendant work context
details: Comprehensive unpaid hours crisis section with Timer icon
Detailed explanation of what constitutes unpaid work for flight attendants
Context about pre-flight preparation, post-flight duties, and safety procedures
Visual breakdown of unpaid duties with bullet points and styling

changes.description: Safety implications coverage in strike analysis
details: Added safety title and description sections
Coverage of how unpaid work affects safety protocols
Explanation of the connection between compensation and safety standards
Professional presentation of safety concerns

changes.description: Enhanced transparency in loss calculation methodology
details: Source verification system with comprehensive tooltips
SourceTooltip component for credible source linking
Hover effects and visual indicators for sourced information
External link integration with proper accessibility

changes.description: Advanced tooltip system for source verification
details: Custom SourceTooltip component with Radix UI integration
Animated hover effects with pulse indicators
Proper tooltip positioning and backdrop blur effects
Accessibility features for screen readers

1.0.0.title: Initial Launch
1.0.0.summary: Full launch of Air Canada Strike Tracker with comprehensive real-time tracking and analysis features

changes.description: Real-time strike tracking with projected financial losses
details: Live financial loss calculations based on TD Cowen analyst estimates
Real-time visitor tracking with diurnal pattern simulation
Strike duration timer with days, hours, minutes, seconds
Per-flight-attendant loss calculations and projections
Formatted currency display with large number abbreviations
Responsive card layout with gradient backgrounds and shadows

changes.description: Advanced React architecture with modern tooling
details: React 18.3 with TypeScript for type safety
Vite build system for fast development and optimization
TanStack Query for efficient data management
React Router DOM for client-side routing
Modern React patterns with hooks and functional components

changes.description: Complete bilingual support (English/French)
details: i18next integration with language detection
Comprehensive translation files for all content
Language switching with persistent user preference
Proper URL routing for language-specific pages (/fr)
Browser language detection and localStorage caching

changes.description: Breaking news banner system with live updates
details: Dismissible breaking news banner with gradient backgrounds
Animated pulse effects and background patterns
External link integration to news sources
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
Alert triangle icons and proper styling

changes.description: Interactive timeline of strike events and milestones
details: Comprehensive timeline from contract expiry to current events
Visual timeline with icons for different event types
Source verification for all timeline events
Badge system for event categorization (destructive, warning, secondary)
Card-based layout with proper spacing and typography

changes.description: Comprehensive strike story with financial analysis
details: Story introduction with timeline cards
Financial absurdity calculations and context
Story highlights with staggered animation reveal
Intersection Observer for scroll-triggered animations
Professional typography with display and text sizing

changes.description: Source verification system with credible news outlets
details: Comprehensive source linking to Reuters, CNBC, CUPE, Air Canada
Source categorization and verification badges
External link handling with proper security (noopener noreferrer)
Source tooltip system for transparency
Credible journalism standards with proper attribution

changes.description: Resource center with categorized external links
details: Organized resource categories for different stakeholder groups
External link management with proper routing
Card-based resource presentation
Search and filtering capabilities for resources
Comprehensive documentation and reference materials

changes.description: Professional design system with Tailwind CSS
details: Comprehensive design tokens for colors, typography, spacing
Semantic color system with HSL values for theming
Gradient backgrounds and shadow system
Animation utilities with keyframes and transitions
Responsive design patterns for all screen sizes

changes.description: Optimized performance with modern web standards
details: Code splitting with dynamic imports
Optimized bundle size with tree shaking
Efficient re-rendering with React optimization patterns
Local storage integration for visitor tracking persistence
Intersection Observer API for performance-friendly animations
